evals.prompt: I already have this PRD written up for widgetin (the repo is at /tmp/widgetin). Skip the brainstorm/interview steps — just read the PRD from /home/dev/ai-workflow/my-skills/brainstorm-to-issues-workspace/prd.md, explore the codebase, and break it into issues. Don't actually create any GitHub issues — just output the breakdown to a markdown file at the output path.
evals.expected_output: A markdown file containing: issue breakdown with file footprints per issue, dependency chains that serialize file-overlapping issues, parallel lanes view showing which issues can run simultaneously, and no two simultaneously-unblocked issues sharing the same files.
